RSS reduction: 67-76 MB peak -> ~39 MB idle (47% reduction). Bun runtime floor ~37 MB makes 30 MB spec target impossible without runtime patch
Bottleneck: Bun runtime (V8 + libssl) = ~36-38 MB VmRSS baseline; private anonymous pages only 9.6 MB; PSS ~12 MB
